case_title: KRIVAL,STEPHEN VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,277.74 FILED BY KRIVAL,STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY   AND   COUNTY  OF SAN FRANCISCO SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY:ATTN/DAVID ALSTON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
